pure_vanilla.label: Pure Vanilla
pure_vanilla.description: Zero mods, straight from Mojang. Paper server for performance.

optimized.label: Optimized
optimized.description: Performance mods only (Sodium, Lithium, Starlight). No gameplay changes — looks and plays like vanilla but runs better.

qol.label: Quality of Life
qol.description: Optimized + minimap, inventory sorting, voice chat. No new content, just convenience.

atm10.label: All The Mods 10
atm10.description: Kitchen-sink modpack with 400+ mods. Heavy, needs 8GB+ RAM.

create.label: Create Mod
create.description: Create mod + addons. Building, automation, and engineering.

forge.label: Forge (Blank)
forge.description: Forge modloader with no mods. Add your own mods via Panel file manager.

fabric.label: Fabric (Blank)
fabric.description: Fabric modloader with no mods. Add your own mods via Panel file manager.

vanilla.label: Vanilla Valheim
vanilla.description: Stock Valheim dedicated server. No mods.

plus.label: Valheim Plus
plus.description: QoL mod — stamina tweaks, build improvements, shared map. No new content.
